description:
Open-source native GitLab client for Android and desktop
Gitlalchemy is an open-source native GitLab client built with Tauri v2, React, and TypeScript.

Browse your GitLab projects, issues, merge requests, pipelines, and notifications — without a browser, on your phone or your computer.

Features:
- Browse projects, issues, and merge requests
- View CI/CD pipelines and job logs
- Receive notifications
- Personal Access Token authentication
- Works on Android and desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows)

No telemetry. No ads. No tracking. Your data stays yours.
